pattern: Simulate the event sequence, tracking the current occupancy and recording the peak as the answer.
hints: Keep a running count of people currently in the room: increment on 'E', decrement on 'L'.
The minimum number of chairs needed equals the maximum occupancy ever reached during the simulation.
A single pass through the string is sufficient — no sorting or extra data structures needed.

edge_inputs.description: alternating enter/leave with extra enter at end
peak occurs in the middle, not at end
all enters bunched then all leaves

stress.description: random valid sequence with balanced enters and leaves
